Class AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataFolderNode

java.lang.Object
java.beans.FeatureDescriptor
org.openide.nodes.Node
org.openide.nodes.AbstractNode
uno.anahata.asi.nb.nodes.AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataFolderNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.openide.util.HelpCtx.Provider, org.openide.util.Lookup.Provider
Enclosing class:
AnahataNodeFactory
private static class AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataFolderNode extends org.openide.nodes.AbstractNode
A virtual folder node named "Anahata" that serves as a container for AI-related files.
Author:
anahata

  • Method Details

    • getIcon

      public Image getIcon(int type)

      Returns the merged folder icon with the Anahata overlay to visually identify this as an AI-enabled folder.

      Overrides:
      getIcon in class org.openide.nodes.AbstractNode

    • getOpenedIcon

      public Image getOpenedIcon(int type)

      Returns the merged open folder icon with the Anahata overlay.

      Overrides:
      getOpenedIcon in class org.openide.nodes.AbstractNode

    • createMergedIcon

      private Image createMergedIcon(String baseIconPath)
      Merges the base folder icon with the Anahata overlay.
      Parameters:
      baseIconPath - The path to the base icon.
      Returns:
      The merged image.
